title: "Create an Update" automation Action is
excerpt: I’ve set up a simple automation with a Status Change trigger and the action being “Create an Update”.  I’ve used the variables provided in my update text.  However, the automation is not creating updates with the actual …

posts.author: AJW (Tony Warncke)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve set up a simple automation with a Status Change trigger and the action being “Create an Update”. I’ve used the variables provided in my update text. However, the automation is not creating updates with the actual cell values. It shows the cell’s address not the actual values within. Is this a known issue and/or am I doing something incorrectly? Thanks!

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: This looks to be a parsing bug, while I’ve never seen it before, you are not doing anything wrong. Definitely reach out to support since thats tracked far more closely than the community.

posts.author: AJW (Tony Warncke)
posts.cookedHtml: Ok. Will do. Thanks for the guidance. This was my first post. Still learning my way around…
